author: Dr. Anil Mehta (Transplant Surgery)
content:
LIVER TRANSPLANT — BRIEF OPERATIVE / HOSPITALIZATION SUMMARY
Date of transplant: 7/19/2027
Surgeon: Dr. Anil Mehta (Transplant Surgery)

PROCEDURE: Deceased-donor orthotopic liver transplant. Standard technique; acceptable cold ischemia time. No major intraoperative complications.

POST-OP: Initial graft function good (downtrending bilirubin/INR, improving synthetic function). Immunosuppression started: tacrolimus, mycophenolate mofetil, prednisone taper; PJP prophylaxis. Uncomplicated early course; discharged on the transplant immunosuppression and prophylaxis regimen.

FOLLOW-UP: Transplant hepatology clinic; reassess diuretics, lactulose, and rifaximin on follow-up.
attestation: Electronically signed by Dr. Anil Mehta, MD (Transplant Surgery). 7/19/2027.
